description: Spring JDBC repository expert guide: DSL metadata, EasyCriteria, Spring Data Query Methods, trait extension patterns, N+1 prevention, performance best practices.
Result and Pageable response structures: SimpleResultBuilder, PageableResultBuilder, PageRequest handling, input_repeated/output_repeated.
Proto to HTTP REST mapping: service/operation/message/field annotations, authorization (low_limit_risky_mode/rbac), pageable, mock configuration.
Proto to database mapping: table/column annotations, wires (IDENTIFIABLE/AUDITABLE/DELETABLE), enum mapping, Liquibase integration.
Enum and error code definition: code/message/message2, error sub-message (title/tips/http_status/phase/severity), type constraints.
RBAC security: 5 template files (Customer/AnonymousCustomer/QuickCustomerRoleChecker/JwtCustomizer/SecurityCustomizer), HopeContextHolder access.
Vben frontend guide: hard constraints (no manual router/API), auto-router via defineOptions, generated API SDK, LIST/FORM/DETAIL page patterns.
Error handling: proto-first error definition, HopeErrorDetailException, builder.error(), forbidden raw exceptions.
